name: Theme Showcase
content_html:
Theme Showcase

Every primitive the theme defines — swap the page style in the admin to preview each palette × width combination. This page uses the site default when no explicit style is assigned.

Hero block

Composable demos on a single codebase.

The hero uses --color-gradient, --color-accent-fg, and inherits the container width from the theme.

Primary CTA Secondary

Typography

Heading 1 — clamp(2.2, 4vw, 3.25rem)

Heading 2 — section title

Heading 3 — subsection

Heading 4 — card title

Body copy. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Every theme ships --font-sans and an optional --font-heading, defaulting to Inter + system stack.

A link uses --color-link and flips to --color-link-hover on hover with a 3 px underline offset.

Typography is the craft of endowing human language with a durable visual form.Robert Bringhurst

Buttons — four contrast-safe variants

Accent Contrast Standard Inactive

Columns — 2 & 3

Two columns with image + text

Left column

Cards pick up --color-surface, --color-border, and a subtle shadow. Works on both light and dark themes.

Image + text

Full-bleed image with caption under.

Three columns

First

A short feature summary with a concrete outcome.

Second

Another feature. Grid is auto-fit; drops to a single column below 280 px.

Third

Third feature, evenly balanced.

Lists

Unordered

  • First bullet item
  • Second bullet with a longer piece of copy that wraps onto two lines for demonstration.
  • Third bullet

Ordered

  1. Step one — click the button.
  2. Step two — confirm the selection.
  3. Step three — ship it.

Quotation / testimonial

“We shipped a hotel-booking demo, a medical-clinic clone, and a SaaS billing page in four days using the same codebase. The plugin model is the quiet revolution here.”

— Jamie Ríos, Product Lead

Carousel (CSS scroll-snap)

Slide 1

No JS. Swipe / scroll horizontally.

Slide 2

Each card snaps to the start on release.

Slide 3

Responsive width via clamp().

Slide 4

Pure CSS — theme-agnostic.

Slide 5

Add as many as you like.

Image gallery

Accordion (<details>)

What browsers are supported?

All evergreen browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). IE11 is not supported.

Can I self-host?

Yes — every piece is Apache-2.0 and ships as Docker images.

How do payments work?

Stripe by default; PayPal and YooKassa ship as plugins. You can write your own adapter in about 80 lines.

Ready to ship?

The CTA band uses the same gradient tokens as the hero, with a lighter vertical rhythm.

Start free trial

Fonts

Inter — body sans. Default for paragraph text.

JetBrains Mono — monospace used for code tags and API examples.

Georgia / Times — available as a serif fallback when themes opt in via --font-heading.
meta_description: Every element the CMS theme paints: buttons, tables, columns, heroes, flyouts, CTA, quotation, carousel, image gallery, typography, fonts.
